name: Playwright
description: Local browser inspection and automation via Playwright's MCP server
description_zh: 通过 Playwright MCP 服务器进行本地浏览器检查和自动化

mcp_config.name: playwright
mcp_config.description: Playwright - browser automation, page inspection, screenshots

auth.help_text: Requires Node.js and npx installed locally
auth.help_text_zh: 需要本地安装 Node.js 和 npx

name: Browserbase
description: Cloud browser automation through Browserbase's hosted MCP server
description_zh: 通过 Browserbase 云端 MCP 服务器进行浏览器自动化

mcp_config.name: browserbase
mcp_config.description: Browserbase - cloud browser automation, page scraping

auth.help_text: Get your API key from Browserbase dashboard
auth.help_text_zh: 从 Browserbase 控制台获取 API Key
